descriptions: The IRA used Direct Action Against Drugs as a cover name for its actions against drug dealers.
edges.evidence_quote: The IRA targeted drug dealers with punishment shootings and ordered them to leave Ireland, and some were killed using the covername Direct Action Against Drugs.

descriptions: Morabito and these cosche were arrested together in the Old Family operation, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 4 giugno 2013 con l'operazione Old Family a Crotone vengono arrestate 35 persone appartenenti alle cosche Vrenna-Ciampà-Corigliano-Bonaventura, Farao-Marincola, Ciampà-Megna-Cazzato, Grande Aracri e Morabito

descriptions: Throttle Twisters merged into Satan's Choice in 1965.
edges.evidence_quote: a 1965 alliance of four regional motorcycle clubs: the Phantom Riders of Oshawa, the Canadian Lancers of Scarborough, the Throttle Twisters of Preston, and the Wild Ones of Port Credit.

descriptions: Ida Boys formed from younger TMD members associating with London Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the younger members of TMD had begun to associate with the London Bloods movement and began calling themselves Ida Boys

Black Mafia Family.description: The Black Mafia Family (BMF) is a drug trafficking and money laundering organization founded in 1985 in Detroit, Michigan by brothers Demetrius and Terry Flenory. It distributed cocaine across the United States with ties to Mexican cartels, and later used a hip-hop record label as a front. The organization was dismantled in 2005 after a federal investigation, with the Flenory brothers sentenced to 30 years in prison.

descriptions: BMF listed Crips as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation (Gangster Disciples, Black Disciples, Black Gangsters, Insane Spanish Cobras, Maniac Latin Disciples, Imperial Gangsters, Gangster Sin City Boys, Simon City Royals, etc), Crips, Zoe Pound, etc.

descriptions: Crips is listed as an ally of BMF in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation ( Gangster Disciples , Black Disciples , Black Gangsters, Insane Spanish Cobras , Maniac Latin Disciples , Imperial Gangsters , Gangster Sin City Boys, Simon City Royals , etc), Crips , Zoe Pound , etc.

descriptions: BMF listed Folk Nation as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation (Gangster Disciples, Black Disciples, Black Gangsters, Insane Spanish Cobras, Maniac Latin Disciples, Imperial Gangsters, Gangster Sin City Boys, Simon City Royals, etc), Crips, Zoe Pound, etc.

descriptions: Folk Nation is listed as an ally of BMF in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation ( Gangster Disciples , Black Disciples , Black Gangsters, Insane Spanish Cobras , Maniac Latin Disciples , Imperial Gangsters , Gangster Sin City Boys, Simon City Royals , etc), Crips , Zoe Pound , etc.

descriptions: BMF had direct links to Mexican drug cartels for cocaine supply.
edges.evidence_quote: By 2000, it had established cocaine distribution sales throughout the United States through its Los Angeles–based drug source and direct links to Mexican drug cartels.

descriptions: Sin City Mafia is described as BMF's sister organization.
edges.evidence_quote: They traced the last number called in Gatling's phone to Jerry Davis, leader of BMF's supposed sister organization , the Sin City Mafia.

descriptions: BMF listed Zoe Pound as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation (Gangster Disciples, Black Disciples, Black Gangsters, Insane Spanish Cobras, Maniac Latin Disciples, Imperial Gangsters, Gangster Sin City Boys, Simon City Royals, etc), Crips, Zoe Pound, etc.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are mentioned alongside Black Mafia Family as comparable Detroit gangs, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Like other Detroit street gangs, such as their Westside Detroit counterparts in the late 1970s; the Nasty Flynns (later the NF Bangers), and 7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs or the drug consortiums of the 1980s such as Young Boys Inc., Pony Down, Best Friends, Black Mafia Family and the Chambers Brothers, the Errol Flynns grew out of the racial and economic unrest that transformed Detroit in the late 1960s and 1970s.

descriptions: OutLaw Gangster Disciples is allied with Black Mafia Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation , Crips , Zoe Pound Gang , Black Guerilla Family , and Black Mafia Family

descriptions: Black Mafia Family rose to prominence after YBI's downfall, indicating a successor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Many gangs, such as "Best Friends", "Pony Down", " Black Mafia Family ", and " The Chambers Brothers ", rose to prominence in the wake of the YBI

descriptions: Zoe Pound is allied with Black Mafia Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Mafia Family , Bloods , and Crips

edges.evidence_quote: The Taliban emerged as an offshoot of the Baghdad Boys

edges.evidence_quote: The Taliban form alliances with gangs ( People's Liberation Army and the Group of 41 ) of the Kalenjin tribe

descriptions: The Rosenzweig Gang and Paul Gang were in a violent conflict over control of labor slugging.
edges.evidence_quote: Rosenzweig's dominance was challenged in 1913, when Philip "Pinchey" Paul began a war with Rosenzweig, lasting over several months.

descriptions: Mazzaferro has contacts with Calabrò.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: Calabrò is listed as an allied 'ndrina in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Calabrò

descriptions: Harvard Park Brims are listed as allies of Florencia 13 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia , Sureños , Pueblo Bishop Bloods , Mad Swan Bloods , Harvard Park Brims , East Coast Crips (Former rivals)

Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club.description: Multiracial one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1967 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Active nationwide in the United States and Puerto Rico, with chapters in at least 25 states. Engages in drug trafficking, robbery, murder, and other violent crimes. Considered a violent gang by federal officials.

descriptions: Bandidos fought with Wheels of Soul at a fundraiser.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Wheels of Soul were holding a fundraising event ... when Bandidos bikers arrived, prompting a fight between the clubs

descriptions: A Wheels of Soul member attacked Hell's Lovers clubhouse, and Hell's Lovers returned fire, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On August 2, 2010, a member of the Wheels of Soul fired upon the Hell's Lovers' clubhouse in Denver with a shotgun from a sports utility vehicle. Three Hell's Lovers bikers who were inside the clubhouse returned fire.

descriptions: Pagans attacked Wheels of Soul to stop their expansion.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1982, the Pagans attacked members of the Wheels of Soul in Philadelphia in an effort to cease the Wheels of Souls' expansion.

descriptions: Sin City Deciples are rivals with Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sin City Deciples are rivals with the Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Wheels of Soul engaged in a shootout with rival gang Ghetto Riders in 1979.
edges.evidence_quote: On November 22, 1979, Wheels of Soul was involved in a shootout at Woodrow Wilson High School in Camden, New Jersey against rival gang Ghetto Riders.

descriptions: Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club is listed as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

descriptions: Wheels of Soul attacked the clubhouse of Hell's Lovers in 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: On August 2, 2010, Wheels of Soul biker Marshall 'Big Bo' Fry fired a shotgun at the clubhouse of the Hell's Lovers in Denver.

descriptions: Outcast Motorcycle Club is listed as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

descriptions: Wheels of Soul plotted to kill members of Outcast Motorcycle Club in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: At the direction of Colorado chapter president Jerry 'Shakka' Elkins, Fry and another Wheels of Soul member, Rasheed Jamal 'Diamond' Brandon, traveled to East St. Louis, Illinois to kill members of the Outkast motorcycle gang in January 2011.

descriptions: Outcast Motorcycle Club suspected of killing a Wheels of Soul member in 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: On August 30, 2014, Wheels of Soul member Steven Hicks was fatally gunned down while attending a party in Birmingham, Alabama... It is suspected that members of the rival Outcast Motorcycle Club had shown up to the event with firearms and opened fire.

descriptions: Wheels of Soul engaged in a shootout with Real Kings Motorcycle Club in 2013, resulting in deaths on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: On January 29, 2013, two members of the Real Kings Motorcycle Club entered the Cycle Gear in North Charleston, South Carolina... Five members of the Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club then entered the shop and told the Real Kings members that they were not supposed to be there. This led to a melee confrontation which erupted into a shootout, leaving the president of the Real Kings MC dead as well as two Wheels of Soul MC members.

descriptions: A Wheels of Soul member and a Showstopper Motorcycle Club member were killed together in the same incident.
edges.evidence_quote: On August 30, 2014, Wheels of Soul member Steven Hicks was fatally gunned down while attending a party in Birmingham, Alabama, along with Wilbert Hawkins, a member of the Showstopper Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Sin City Titans is listed as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

descriptions: Wheels of Soul killed a member of Sin City Titans in 2009.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2009, in an incident with a rival gang, members of the Wheels of Soul gunned down a member of the Sin City Titans in St. Louis, Missouri.

descriptions: Street Soldiers is listed as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

descriptions: Wheels of Soul killed a member of Street Soldiers in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: Sometime during January 2011 in Chicago, a Wheels of Soul member shot a member of a rival gang, the Street Soldiers, killing them.

descriptions: Iannazzo lists De Luca as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Cannizzaro-Daponte, Pagliuso, Giampà, De Luca, Dattilo

descriptions: Zampa crime family is a defunct component of the Corsican mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Zampa crime family (defunct)

descriptions: FMV is listed as a rival of Bala na Cara in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Os Manos , V7 , FMV

descriptions: Elephant and Castle Mob was allied with the Finsbury Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: They were allied to the Birmingham gang, often called the Brummagems, led by Billy Kimber; the Camden Town gang, led by George Sage and the Finsbury Boys, led by Freddie Gilbert.

descriptions: Abu Amara Brigades is a faction within Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: the Israeli Mossad assassinated the Syrian scientist, Aziz Azbar, with the assistance of Abu Amara Brigades, which is a faction within Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham.

descriptions: Bocchetti clan is a member of the Secondigliano Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Apart from the Licciardi clan, the alliance included the Contini, Mallardo, Lo Russo, Stabile, Prestieri, Bocchetti and Di Lauro clans.

Popeye Moto Club.description: French-Canadian outlaw motorcycle club and criminal organization based in Quebec, founded in 1965. At its peak, it was the second-largest biker gang in Canada. Known for violence and enforcing a strict policy against other clubs' red-and-white color schemes. In 1977, the club was absorbed by the Hells Angels and became the first Canadian Hells Angels charter.

descriptions: Devil's Disciples fought a biker war with the Popeyes, which led to their disbandment.
edges.evidence_quote: the club achieved a short-lived prominence in Montreal and was, for a time, the most powerful motorcycle gang in the city before disbanding in January 1976 as a result of a biker war with the Popeyes

descriptions: The Dubois Brothers hired the Popeyes to fight the Devil's Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: hired another muscle group of bikers called the Popeyes Motorcycle Club

descriptions: Gitans MC bought drugs from Popeye MC, who also supplied them with weapons.
edges.evidence_quote: They bought their narcotics stockpile from the Popeye Moto Club

descriptions: Popeyes patched over to become Hells Angels chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: On 5 December 1977, the first Canadian chapter was founded in Montreal when a club called the Popeyes led by Yves Buteau were 'patched over'.

descriptions: Hells Angels absorbed Popeyes through a patch over.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels first entered Canada via a 'patch over' of the Popeyes of Montreal on 5 December 1977

descriptions: The 13th Tribe MC are listed as allies of the Popeyes in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: The Popeyes and Devil's Disciples fought a turf war from 1968 to 1970.
edges.evidence_quote: From 1968 up until 1970, a short but violent turf war for control of the drug trade went between the Popeyes and Devil's Disciples MC, another Canadian outlaw biker gang (unrelated to the similarly named U.S.-based club).

descriptions: Popeyes were in conflict with Devil's Disciples, killing 15 members.
edges.evidence_quote: The Popeyes had targeted the Devil's Disciples biker gang

descriptions: The Popeyes worked as muscle for the Dubois Brothers in the early 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1970s, the Popeyes began working as "muscle" for the Dubois Brothers, a prominent crime family in Montreal.

descriptions: Dubois Brothers supported the Popeyes during the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the Dubois Brothers gang backed the Popeyes

descriptions: The Gitans MC are listed as allies of the Popeyes in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: The Grim Reapers are listed as allies of the Popeyes in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: The Hells Angels were longtime allies of the Popeyes and absorbed them in 1977.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1977, the Popeyes were "patched over" (absorbed) by their longtime allies the Hells Angels Motorcycle Club and subsequently rebranded as the very first Canadian Hells Angels charter.

descriptions: Popeyes were backed by Hells Angels during the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hells Angels-backed Popeyes

descriptions: The Popeyes eventually became the first Hells Angels chapter in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: a rival outlaw biker club that would eventually become the first Hells Angels chapter in Canada.

descriptions: Popeye MC became the first Hells Angels chapter in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: the Popeye Moto Club ... became the country's first-ever Hells Angels chapter: Hells Angels MC Montreal.

descriptions: The Mongols MC was absorbed by the Popeyes' Rive-Sud chapter in late 1974.
edges.evidence_quote: A fellow Quebec-based club, the Drummondville-based Mongols MC (unrelated to the U.S.-based club of the same name), became absorbed by the Popeyes's Rive-Sud chapter in late 1974.

descriptions: The Outlaws backed Satan's Choice, which was in conflict with the Popeyes, making the Outlaws a rival of the Popeyes.
edges.evidence_quote: With Satan's Choice MC being backed by the Outlaws Motorcycle Club, a rival of the Hells Angels, it caused conflict between them and the Popeyes MC, who were allied with the Hells Angels.

descriptions: The Rizzuto crime family is listed as an ally of the Popeyes in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice is described as a rival of the Popeyes.
edges.evidence_quote: At their peak, they were the second-largest biker gang in all of Canada, behind the rivaling Satan's Choice.

descriptions: The Popeyes and Satan's Choice fought a two-year war.
edges.evidence_quote: This led to a two-year war between Satan's Choice and the Popeyes which resulted in the death of at least one Popeyes patch-holder and the injuries of many Satan's Choice members.

descriptions: The Sundowners MC are listed as allies of the Popeyes in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice fought the Popeyes in a biker conflict from 1974 to 1976.
edges.evidence_quote: The club was involved in the first major outlaw biker conflict in Canadian history, when it engaged the country's second largest club, the Popeyes, from 1974 to 1976.

descriptions: Popeye MC listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC (1974–1995), Outlaws MC (1977–2000), Black Diamond Riders MC, Loners MC, Popeye MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice and Popeyes were rivals, engaged in a biker war from 1974 to 1976.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Popeye MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice fought the Popeyes in a biker conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The club was involved in the first major outlaw biker conflict in Canadian history, when it engaged the country's second largest club, the Popeyes, from 1974 to 1976.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC (1974–1995), Outlaws MC (1977–2000), Black Diamond Riders MC, Loners MC, Popeye MC

descriptions: Both groups were linked to the IronMarch forum, indicating a shared platform but not a direct relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: the Neo-fascist and Neo-Nazi web forum IronMarch.org, which, prior to its shutdown in 2017, had been linked to several acts of Neo-Nazi terrorism and violent militant groups such as ... Golden Dawn

descriptions: Bacchus has a close relationship with Vagabonds MC.
edges.evidence_quote: The club manages close relationships with other well-established Canadian motorcycle clubs like Para-dice Riders MC, Vagabonds MC, Highlanders MC, and the Charlottetown Harley Club.

'Ndrina Belfiore.description: The 'Ndrina Belfiore is a Calabrian criminal organization based in Gioiosa Jonica, with settlements in Turin, France, and Spain. It was involved in the 1983 murder of magistrate Bruno Caccia in Turin, for which Domenico Belfiore was sentenced to life imprisonment. The group has been engaged in drug trafficking and has formed alliances with other 'Ndrangheta clans. Recent operations against the clan include 'Gioco duro' in 2008 and 'Viceré' in 2018.

descriptions: Belfiore and Piromalli were jointly involved in a drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1994 vengono sequestrati dal distretto antimafia di Torino 5 tonnellate di droga alla cosca dei Piromalli e dei Belfiore

descriptions: Belfiore forms alliances with Ursino-Macrì in Turin.
edges.evidence_quote: A Torino stringono alleanze con gli Ursino -Macrì.

descriptions: Belfiore and Ursino jointly ordered the murder of magistrate Bruno Caccia.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 giugno 1983 fanno uccidere insieme agli Ursino a Torino il magistrato Bruno Caccia.

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Belfiore.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Piromalli and Belfiore were involved together in a drug trafficking operation in 1994.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1994 vengono sequestrati ... 5 tonnellate di droga alla cosca dei Piromalli e dei Belfiore

descriptions: The Belfiore act as referents for the Ursino in Turin.

descriptions: Clan dei Catanesi sold drugs to their Calabrian allies, the Belfiore.
edges.evidence_quote: I Miano si rifornivano di droga ... e successivamente la rivendevano ai loro alleati calabresi, i Belfiore e gli Ursino

descriptions: Big Circle Gang was formed by former members of the Red Guards.

descriptions: The clan incorporated members of the Red Berets paramilitary unit.

National Liberation Army (Colombia).description: Colombian far-left guerrilla organization founded in 1964 by Fabio Vásquez Castaño and other rebels trained in Cuba. Advocates a composite ideology of Marxism-Leninism, Camilism, and liberation theology. Engaged in the Colombian conflict, with an estimated 5,000 fighters in Colombia and Venezuela as of 2026. Designated as a terrorist group by several countries and the EU.

edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: FARC-EP, ELN , Bloque Centauros de las AUC

descriptions: AUC was formed to combat ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Se consolidó como agrupación de varios grupos paramilitares el 18 de abril de 1997 para combatir a las guerrillas como: FARC-EP , ELN y disidencias del EPL .

descriptions: The AUC was formed to combat the ELN guerrilla group.

edges.evidence_quote: The FARC dissidents have become 'an increasing headache' for the Colombian armed forces, as they have to fight them, the EPL, ELN and Clan del Golfo at the same time.

descriptions: UC-ELN is listed as an ally of FARC dissidents in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: UC-ELN (Varies from group to group)

descriptions: Los Caparrapos are possibly allied with ELN against Clan del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: Están posiblemente aliados con el ELN y las disidencias de las FARC-EP en su guerra contra el Clan del Golfo

descriptions: Los Rastrojos fought battles against ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Rastrojos have frequently fought battles against the guerrilla groups ... ELN

descriptions: By March 2020, Los Rastrojos was in armed conflict with ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: By March 2020, Los Rastrojos no longer had an alliance with the Colombian left-wing militant group National Liberation Army (ELN) and was now involved in a direct armed conflict with the group as well.

descriptions: Los Rastrojos consider ELN as enemies according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos no estatales: Ejército de Liberación Nacional

descriptions: ELN is listed as a non-state enemy of Los Rastrojos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos no estatales : , Ejército de Liberación Nacional , Clan del Golfo

descriptions: Los Rastrojos had an agreement with ELN for several years.
edges.evidence_quote: Currently, the Rastrojos have an agreement with the National Liberation Army (Ejército de Liberación Nacional – ELN) for several years in the departments of Cauca and Nariño.

descriptions: Los Rastrojos had an agreement with ELN for several years.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Rastrojos tienen un convenio con el Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN) por varios años

descriptions: The text mentions ELN and FARC dissidents in the context of Guaidó's accusations, but does not state a direct relationship with Los Rastrojos.
edges.evidence_quote: Guaidó acusó a Maduro de 'distraer la atención de lo central' y le exigió que entregara a Colombia a 'todos los irregulares' en suelo venezolano, específicamente a los guerrilleros del Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN) y a los disidentes de las FARC-EP

descriptions: Escobar hired the ELN to carry out bombings and assassinations.
edges.evidence_quote: Escobar also maintained relations with the Sandinista government in Nicaragua and hired the National Liberation Army (ELN) to carry out bombings and assassinations against government targets.

descriptions: ELN attacked and assassinated members of Esperanza, Paz y Libertad.
edges.evidence_quote: The FARC, the remaining EPL dissidents and the ELN considered Esperanza, Paz y Libertad and all the demobilized EPL to be 'traitors' and paramilitary collaborators, initiating a series of attacks and assassination attempts on the former EPL members.

descriptions: Infobox lists FARC dissidents as opponents of ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... FARC dissidents

descriptions: ELN and FARC dissidents met to form a potential alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the ELN and FARC dissidents met together in Venezuela to form a potential alliance in October 2018

descriptions: Escobar hired ELN for bombings and assassinations.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN had relations with Pablo Escobar, with Escobar often hiring the ELN to carry out bombings and assassinations against government targets.

descriptions: Local FARC and ELN forces fought each other in Arauca.
edges.evidence_quote: mutual rivalries between local FARC and ELN forces escalated into hostilities in Arauca

descriptions: Infobox lists FARC-EP as an ally of ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Venezuela (2014–2026) Tupamaro , FARC-EP

descriptions: ELN and FARC-EP occasionally operated together.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN also occasionally operated with the FARC-EP

descriptions: The text distinguishes ELN from FARC by social composition, not a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: a social composition that distinguishes it from the FARC guerrillas, who are essentially peasants.

descriptions: Infobox lists Tupamaro as an ally of ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Venezuela (2014–2026) Tupamaro , FARC-EP

descriptions: Tupamaro movement supports ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN has received support from the Tupamaro movement in Venezuela

descriptions: AUC thwarted ELN's demilitarized zone initiative and conducts anti-guerrilla operations against ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: A Colombian government initiative towards granting the ELN a demilitarized zone in the southern region of the Bolívar Department was thwarted by right-wing political pressure from the United Self-Defense Forces of Colombia (AUC) whose paramilitary mercenaries conduct anti-guerrilla operations in that part of the department.

descriptions: Los Pelusos are at war with ELN in the Catatumbo region.
edges.evidence_quote: la guerra que sostienen con el ELN en la región

descriptions: EPL is in confrontation with ELN over territorial control and declared war on ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: En esta zona, mantiene una confrontación con el Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN) por el control territorial; en su momento, la guerrilla le declaró oficialmente la guerra al ELN «hasta recuperar lo que ellos consideran su territorio y su gente».

descriptions: EPL considered ELN as enemies until 2021.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ELN ( hasta 2021 )

descriptions: EPL declared war on ELN in 2018, ending a tacit alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: el EPL le declara la guerra al Frente de Guerra Nororiental del Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN) desde el 20 de marzo de 2018, terminando de esta manera la alianza tácita que tenían estos dos grupos

descriptions: EPL and ELN were allies until 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ELN ( Hasta 2017 )

descriptions: FARC is allied with ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... ELN

descriptions: FARC and ELN announced cooperation to find a political solution to the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 1 July 2013, FARC and the second-largest guerrilla group in Colombia, ELN, announced that they would be working together to find a 'political solution to the social and armed conflict.'

descriptions: Both FARC and ELN are leftwing insurgent groups involved in drug trafficking, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Following their demise, the Norte del Valle cartel has filled the Colombian vacuum, along with rightwing paramilitaries (e.g. United Self-Defense Forces of Colombia , AUC) and leftwing insurgent groups ( FARC , ELN ).

descriptions: FARC and ELN are both left-wing guerrilla groups involved in the Colombian conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: They are only one actor in a complex conflict where atrocities have been committed by the state, right-wing paramilitaries, and left-wing guerrillas not limited to FARC, such as ELN, M-19, and others.

descriptions: FARC and ELN are both left-wing guerrilla groups involved in the Colombian conflict, but no specific relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: They are only one actor in a complex conflict where atrocities have been committed by the state, right-wing paramilitaries, and left-wing guerrillas not limited to FARC, such as ELN, M-19, and others.

descriptions: FARC and ELN are both left-wing guerrilla groups in the Colombian conflict, but no specific relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: They are only one actor in a complex conflict where atrocities have been committed by the state, right-wing paramilitaries, and left-wing guerrillas not limited to FARC, such as ELN, M-19, and others.

descriptions: National Liberation Army is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: National Liberation Army

descriptions: Tren de Aragua is a rival of ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... ELN

descriptions: Tren de Aragua lists ELN as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Oficina, Clan del Golfo, FARC dissidents, ELN, Los Tiguerones (until November 2023), Latin Kings [ unreliable source? ], La Unión Tepito (certain cells), Fuerza Anti-Unión, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: ELN fought against Tren de Aragua in 2021.
edges.evidence_quote: El 25 de mayo de 2021 se presentaron fuertes combates entre el ELN y el Tren de Aragua, aliado del Clan del Golfo

descriptions: AUC considered ELN as main enemy and engaged in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The AUC's main enemies were the leftist insurgency groups Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (FARC) and the National Liberation Army (ELN).

descriptions: AUC retaliated against and attacked ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: The AUC was responsible for retaliations against the FARC and ELN communist organization as well as numerous attacks against civilians beginning in 1997 with the Mapiripán massacre.

descriptions: Both AUC and ELN are involved in drug trafficking in Colombia, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Following their demise, the Norte del Valle cartel has filled the Colombian vacuum, along with rightwing paramilitaries (e.g. United Self-Defense Forces of Colombia , AUC) and leftwing insurgent groups ( FARC , ELN ).

descriptions: Coffin Cheaters absorbed Wizard MC through patching over in 2005.
edges.evidence_quote: later 'patched over' two Norwegian gangs, Forbidden Few MC and Wizard MC, in 2004 and 2005 respectively.

descriptions: Tongan Foe Lyfe Ganster Crip is listed as an ally of Tongan Crip Gang in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sons of Samoa , Tongan Foe Lyfe Ganster Crip, Raymond Avenue Crips

descriptions: Hells Angels and Polynesian Panthers were involved in a brawl, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 1971, members of the Hells Angels, Highway 61, the Mongrel Mob and the Polynesian Panthers were involved in a large-scale brawl in Auckland, which resulted in numerous arrests.

descriptions: Mongrel Mob and Polynesian Panthers fought in a brawl in 1971.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 1971, members of the Hells Angels, Highway 61, the Polynesian Panthers and the Mongrel Mob gangs engaged in a large gang-related brawl in central Auckland.

descriptions: ISKP allied with IMT.
edges.evidence_quote: the newly ordained ISIS–K forged significant alliances with other Sunni jihadist movements in the region to include the Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU), Islamic Movement of Turkmenistan (IMT)

descriptions: White Wolves are alleged to be a splinter group of Combat 18.
edges.evidence_quote: Some journalists believed that the White Wolves are a C18 splinter group, alleging that the group had been set up by Del O'Connor, the former second-in-command of C18

descriptions: The Lenox Street Boys have a rivalry with X-men.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Columbia Point Dawgs (long-standing), Vamp Hill Boys, H Block, X-men, Franklin Hill Giants, Greenwood Street Posse, Ruggles St , 1850 Washington St, Castle Square Cubs

descriptions: Guerrisi and Mercuri merged through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni venti, i Guerrisi s'unirono con i Mercuri

descriptions: Mercuri associated with the Corica family.
